content.query:
SELECT 		DISTINCT TR.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           TR.DLIX as [Delivery Number]
,           OL.ORNO as [Order Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           TR.DLRM as [Carrier]
,           TR.ETRN as [Tracking]
FROM 		M3.MPTRNS TR
JOIN		M3.MHDISH MD ON TR.DLIX = MD.DLIX
JOIN 		M3.OOLINE OL ON MD.RIDN = OL.ORNO
JOIN 		M3.OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
WHERE 		OH.CUNO = 'COM00486'

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM M3.MPTRNS
